SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api.scoring.rules

Class RulePolicyLoader

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.api.scoring.rules.RulePolicyLoader
public class RulePolicyLoader extends Object
Parses a YAML rule policy file into a RulePolicy with pre-parsed expressions.

  • Constructor Details

    • RulePolicyLoader

      public RulePolicyLoader()

  • Method Details

    • tryLoad

      public static RulePolicy tryLoad()
      Try to load a YAML rule policy. Returns null if no YAML rules are available.
      1. System property dv.scoring.rules → load from file path
      2. Classpath risk-scoring-rules.yaml → load from bundled resource
      3. Neither present → return null (fall back to hardcoded scorers)

    • loadFromFile

      public static RulePolicy loadFromFile(String path)
      Load a rule policy from a file path.

    • loadFromStream

      public static RulePolicy loadFromStream(InputStream is)
      Load a rule policy from an input stream (source file unknown).

    • loadFromStream

      public static RulePolicy loadFromStream(InputStream is, String sourceFile)
      Load a rule policy from an input stream with a known source filename.

    • loadUserRules

      public static RulePolicy loadUserRules(InputStream is)
      Load user-defined rules from an input stream. The YAML must contain only a categories key with rules using USR- prefixed IDs. No metadata, severity_mapping, or grade_mapping keys are expected.
      Parameters:
      is - InputStream containing user rules YAML
      Returns:
      RulePolicy with version "user", empty severity/grade mappings, and the parsed categories
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if validation fails (missing id, wrong prefix, etc.)
